violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Inspector observed commercially prepared sandwiches with swollen packaging. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Inspector observed several perishable items past date marking. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

Thermometers are lacking in the 1 door refrigeration unit. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Inspector observed several snack items, from an approved source, without missing items on labels (allergens). New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Beverages were observed stored on the floor in the retail/back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the retail cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The ceiling tiles in the bathroom are in poor repair (1 missing tile and 1 with previous water damage). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/30/2025

The floors under retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2025
Bottled beverages were observed stored on the floor. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 05/13/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the interior of refrigeration units have an accumulation of dust and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/17/2024
